extracted_equations.text: \chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt
\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\, dx\, dy\, dt
$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt

χ = Logos Field. G = Grace. M = Mass/Matter. E = Energy. S = Sin/Entropy. T = Time. K = Knowledge. R = Relationship. Q = Quantum. F = Faith. C = Coherence. Plain English: The framework's central claim — physical and spiritual reality are dual projections of a single informational substrate, expressed as the integral of ten coupled variables over space and time. Coherence Equation (derived from the Master Equation)

C = coherence with the Logos source [0, 1]. O eff = effective openness [0, 1]. G(t) = grace, external negentropic input [0, ∞). S = entropy/sin, decay pressure (0, ∞). (1−C) = room for growth. Plain English: Coherence rises with grace acting through openness on what room is left, and falls with sin acting on existing coherence. This is the engine equation tested across nine biblical/historical datasets in this paper. Effective Openness

O raw = genuine free will. P(t) = preparation function — humanity's capacity to receive and understand grace at time t. Plain English: The channel through which grace acts is free will multiplied by readiness. Both must be nonzero or the coherence equation flatlines. Lifespan Decay (Test 1)

L = post-fall human lifespan. S = entropy term operating on biological systems. Plain English: Genesis genealogies fit a thermodynamic decay curve at R 2 = 0.888. Post-fall lifespans drop the way an exponentially decaying biological system would. Logistic / S-Curve Fit Function

L = curve ceiling. k = steepness. x 0 = inflection point. b = baseline offset. Optimized via Levenberg–Marquardt. Plain English: The standard S-curve used to fit P(t) (R 2 = 0.9008, inflection at 1089 BCE) and revelation density (R 2 = 0.956). Slow start, fast middle, plateau. Statistical Threshold

α = significance threshold for rejecting the null hypothesis. Plain English: Standard scientific threshold — results below p = 0.05 are reported as significant. Both Pearson r (parametric) and Spearman ρ (rank-based) are reported throughout. Strongest Empirical Result — Sin Complexity

ρ = Spearman rank correlation between adversary sophistication and P(t). Plain English: The single strongest result in the test suite: across twelve biblical sin patterns, the adversary's strategic complexity tracks humanity's preparation level at near-perfect rank correlation. Linguistic Complexity Composite (Test 3)

R 2 = composite explained variance across five biblical-text metrics (command complexity, abstraction, moral vocabulary, principle vs. rule, internal focus). Plain English: The preparation function P(t) is empirically visible in the biblical text itself. All five metrics reach significance below p = 10 −10 . Constraint Satisfaction Result (Test C)

C final = end-state coherence at t = present. Grace efficiency = coherence delivered per unit grace deployed. Plain English: Of six divine strategies tested by ODE integration, the biblical pattern is the unique solution that satisfies all three non-negotiable constraints (free will, ever-present grace, structural justice) while achieving the highest coherence among constraint-satisfying strategies. Failed Test — Grace Response Time (Test 4)
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C

Revelation density S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$): Cumulative theological concepts follow the predicted S-curve
Biological data follows framework entropy predictions (Tests 1, 2) â€” lifespan decay and civilization dynamics match $S \cdot C$ dynamics

claims.text: We present 16 independent empirical tests of the Theophysics Master Equation $\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\, dx\, dy\, dt$ and its derived coherence equation $\frac{dC}{dt} = O_{eff} \cdot G(t) \cdot (1-C) - S \cdot C$ against biblical and historical data.
claims.normalized_text: we present 16 independent empirical tests of the theophysics master equation $\chi = \iiint(g \cdot m \cdot e \cdot s \cdot t \cdot k \cdot r \cdot q \cdot f \cdot c)\, dx\, dy\, dt$ and its derived coherence equation $\frac{dc}{dt} = o_{eff} \cdot g(t) \cdot (1-c) - s \cdot c$ against biblical and historical data.
supporting_evidence: data, empirical
defeat_conditions: Needs an explicit failure case: what observation, logic result, or counterexample would make this claim false?

claims.text: Of nine completed tests, eight produce statistically significant results confirming framework predictions, including: (1) biblical lifespan data fitting a thermodynamic decay curve ($R^2 = 0.888$); (2) linguistic complexity across the biblical corpus increasing monotonically with all five metrics significant at $p < 10^{-10}$ and an S-curve fit of $R^2 = 0.90$; (3) adversary sophistication tracking preparation level with Spearman $\rho = 0.988$ ($p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$); (4) prophetic specificity increasing over time ($\rho = 0.764$, $p = 9.1 \times 10^{-4}$); (5) cumulative theological concepts following an S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$); and (6) a constraint satisfaction model demonstrating the biblical pattern as uniquely optimal among six tested strategies under three non-negotiable constraints.
claims.normalized_text: of nine completed tests, eight produce statistically significant results confirming framework predictions, including: (1) biblical lifespan data fitting a thermodynamic decay curve ($r^2 = 0.888$); (2) linguistic complexity across the biblical corpus increasing monotonically with all five metrics significant at $p < 10^{-10}$ and an s-curve fit of $r^2 = 0.90$; (3) adversary sophistication tracking preparation level with spearman $\rho = 0.988$ ($p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$); (4) prophetic specificity increasing over time ($\rho = 0.764$, $p = 9.1 \times 10^{-4}$); (5) cumulative theological concepts following an s-curve ($r^2 = 0.956$); and (6) a constraint satisfaction model demonstrating the biblical pattern as uniquely optimal among six tested strategies under three non-negotiable constraints.
supporting_evidence: data

not_claimed_placeholders: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.

q0_posture.answer: Treat GTQ-17 as a testable paper and keep evidence, kill conditions, and boundary claims separate.
q0_posture.notes: Seeded from GTQ-17 rigor-gate rejection-first requirements.

q1_identity.answer: GTQ-17 What Happened When We Tested the Pattern - Genesis to Quantum
q1_identity.notes: Seeded from GTQ-17 title and paper identity.

q2_location.answer: Genesis-to-Quantum empirical testing lane inside the axioms workflow.
q2_location.notes: Seeded from file location and series metadata.

q3_assertion.answer: The Master Equation makes specific quantitative predictions and the biblical/historical data fits them — including a near-perfect ρ = 0.988 between adversary sophistication and humanity's preparation level.
q3_assertion.notes: Seeded from the highest-salience GTQ-17 claim audit row.

q4_evidence.answer: Of nine completed tests, eight produce statistically significant results confirming framework predictions, including: (1) biblical lifespan data fitting a thermodynamic decay curve ($R^2 = 0.888$); (2) linguistic complexity across the biblical corpus increasing monotonically with all five metrics significant at $p < 10^{-10}$ and an S-curve fit of $R^2 = 0.90$; (3) adversary sophistication tracking preparation level with Spearman $\rho = 0.988$ ($p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$); (4) prophetic specificity increasing over time ($\rho = 0.764$, $p = 9.1 \times 10^{-4}$); (5) cumulative theological concepts following an S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$); and (6) a constraint satisfaction model demonstrating the biblical pattern as uniquely optimal among six tested strategies under three non-negotiable constraints.
q4_evidence.notes: Seeded from GTQ-17 empirical-results claim rows.

q5_dependencies.answer: Of nine completed tests, eight produce statistically significant results confirming framework predictions, including: (1) biblical lifespan data fitting a thermodynamic decay curve ($R^2 = 0.888$); (2) linguistic complexity across the biblical corpus increasing monotonically with all five metrics significant at $p < 10^{-10}$ and an S-curve fit of $R^2 = 0.90$; (3) adversary sophistication tracking preparation level with Spearman $\rho = 0.988$ ($p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$); (4) prophetic specificity increasing over time ($\rho = 0.764$, $p = 9.1 \times 10^{-4}$); (5) cumulative theological concepts following an S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$); and (6) a constraint satisfaction model demonstrating the biblical pattern as uniquely optimal among six tested strategies under three non-negotiable constraints.

q6_consequences.answer: If strengthened, GTQ-17 supports the claim that framework predictions can survive contact with measured biblical and historical data.
q6_consequences.notes: Seeded from GTQ-17 claim audit plus rigor verdict context.

q7_falsification.answer: Falsification: If the distribution is Gaussian, A12.1 (Bimodal Outcome) requires revision.
q7_falsification.notes: Seeded from GTQ-17 falsification and revision-language claims.

what_can_be_tested: If the claim is true, its stated prediction should survive measurement or comparison.
If the claim is true, the described pattern should appear where the paper says it should appear.
If the claim is true, the stated relationship should preserve its variables, direction, and scope.
honest_disclosures: Does not by itself claim that physics proves theology.

contradictions.summary: The strongest results are: Sin complexity curve ($\rho = 0.988$, $p = 2.16 \times 10^{-9}$): Near-perfect rank correlation between adversary sophistication and species preparation level P(t) linguistic complexity (all metrics $p < 10^{-10}$, S-curve $R^2 = 0.90$): The preparation function is empirically visible in the biblical text Revelation density S-curve ($R^2 = 0.956$): Cumulative theological concepts follow the predicted S-curve Constraint satisfaction model : The biblical pattern is uniquely optimal among six strategies under three hard constraints 5.2 The Failed Test Test 4 (Grace Response Time) failed at $p = 0.91$.
contradictions.notes: Sentence contains an explicit falsifiability or prediction marker; preserve it and make the failure case concrete.
